text:
# Welcome!

Hey, <@__USER_ID__>! Welcome to Francesca Hong's Volunteer Workspace! We are really glad you are here. The trickiest part of getting involved is finding out where to start -- here are some resources for doing that!

In the canvas attached to the

channel, you can find the _*Volunteer Handbook*_, which includes:

* an overview of our slack channels
* who our staff and volunteer leadership is, and  
* our community code of conduct that you are expected to adhere to.

If you're on mobile, here's a visual to help you find it:

if you have any questions, please feel free to reach out to any of the following people:

<@U0ANQFZGJCC>
<@U0AFUM631BN>
<@U09KVSFTXDM>
<@U09L4TYJGJF>
